# GitHub Copilot Instructions - Nextract

Use the repository docs as the source of truth:

- Start with [docs/context/AI-CONTEXT.md](../docs/context/AI-CONTEXT.md).
- Follow engineering rules in [docs/context/ENGINEERING-GUIDE.md](../docs/context/ENGINEERING-GUIDE.md).
- Follow design direction in [docs/04-design.md](../docs/04-design.md) and [docs/design/DESIGN.md](../docs/design/DESIGN.md).

Keep MVP scope to YouTube unless the docs explicitly say the feature is part of the current phase.
